tluaTagPartition.tlua(19,7): error TLUA2322: Type '() => void' is not assignable to type 'table'.
tluaTagPartition.tlua(21,7): error TLUA2322: Type 'string & { tag: number; }' is not assignable to type 'table'.
tluaTagPartition.tlua(22,7): error TLUA2322: Type 'thread' is not assignable to type 'table'.
tluaTagPartition.tlua(24,7): error TLUA2322: Type '{ a: number; } & (() => void)' is not assignable to type 'table'.
tluaTagPartition.tlua(25,7): error TLUA2322: Type 'thread & { a: number; }' is not assignable to type 'table'.
tluaTagPartition.tlua(29,7): error TLUA2322: Type '{ n: number; }' is not assignable to type 'function'.
  Type '{ n: number; }' provides no match for the signature '(...: any): (any?, ...any)'.
tluaTagPartition.tlua(32,7): error TLUA2322: Type 'string & { tag: number; }' is not assignable to type 'function'.
  Type 'String & { tag: number; }' provides no match for the signature '(...: any): (any?, ...any)'.
tluaTagPartition.tlua(33,7): error TLUA2322: Type 'thread' is not assignable to type 'function'.
  Type 'thread' provides no match for the signature '(...: any): (any?, ...any)'.
tluaTagPartition.tlua(34,7): error TLUA2322: Type '{ __luaThreadBrand: number; }' is not assignable to type 'function'.
  Type '{ __luaThreadBrand: number; }' provides no match for the signature '(...: any): (any?, ...any)'.
tluaTagPartition.tlua(36,7): error TLUA2322: Type 'thread & { a: number; }' is not assignable to type 'function'.
  Type 'thread & { a: number; }' provides no match for the signature '(...: any): (any?, ...any)'.
tluaTagPartition.tlua(41,65): error TLUA2322: Type '{ n: number; }' is not assignable to type 'number'.


==== tluaTagPartition.tlua (11 errors) ====
    // The runtime-tag partition, locked as one truth table so its three encodings
    // (assignability via isLuaTableType, facts via isFunctionObjectType, narrowing
    // by tag) cannot drift apart silently. Every value kind is checked against both
    // keyword types AND both guards; type() reports exactly one tag per value.
    
    // The kinds under test.
    declare plainTable: { n: number };
    declare fn: () => void;
    local pairing = setmetatable({ n = 1 },
        { __call = function(self: table, x: number): number return x; end });
    declare brandedPrim: string & { tag: number };
    declare thread: thread;
    declare lookalike: { __luaThreadBrand: number };
    declare callableMix: { a: number } & (() => void);
    declare threadMix: thread & { a: number };
    
    // Column 1: assignable to `table`?
    local t1: table = plainTable;
    local t2: table = fn;
          ~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type '() => void' is not assignable to type 'table'.
    local t3: table = pairing;
    local t4: table = brandedPrim;
          ~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'string & { tag: number; }' is not assignable to type 'table'.
    local t5: table = thread;
          ~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'thread' is not assignable to type 'table'.
    local t6: table = lookalike;
    local t7: table = callableMix;
          ~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type '{ a: number; } & (() => void)' is not assignable to type 'table'.
    local t8: table = threadMix;
          ~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'thread & { a: number; }' is not assignable to type 'table'.
    
    // Column 2: assignable to `function`? Structural: anything callable is admitted,
    // so a callable pairing or intersection passes even though type() says "table".
    local f1: function = plainTable;
          ~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type '{ n: number; }' is not assignable to type 'function'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type '{ n: number; }' provides no match for the signature '(...: any): (any?, ...any)'.
    local f2: function = fn;
    local f3: function = pairing;
    local f4: function = brandedPrim;
          ~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'string & { tag: number; }' is not assignable to type 'function'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type 'String & { tag: number; }' provides no match for the signature '(...: any): (any?, ...any)'.
    local f5: function = thread;
          ~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'thread' is not assignable to type 'function'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type 'thread' provides no match for the signature '(...: any): (any?, ...any)'.
    local f6: function = lookalike;
          ~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type '{ __luaThreadBrand: number; }' is not assignable to type 'function'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type '{ __luaThreadBrand: number; }' provides no match for the signature '(...: any): (any?, ...any)'.
    local f7: function = callableMix;
    local f8: function = threadMix;
          ~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type 'thread & { a: number; }' is not assignable to type 'function'.
!!! error TLUA2322:   Type 'thread & { a: number; }' provides no match for the signature '(...: any): (any?, ...any)'.
    
    // Column 3: `type(x) == "table"` narrowing (union with number; a `never` local
    // locks exclusion, a deliberate number-mismatch locks a kept constituent).
    declare uPlain: { n: number } | number;
    if type(uPlain) == "table" then local k1: table = uPlain; local e1: number = uPlain; end
                                                                    ~~
!!! error TLUA2322: Type '{ n: number; }' is not assignable to type 'number'.
    declare uFn: (() => void) | number;
    if type(uFn) == "table" then local d2: never = uFn; end
    declare uPairing: typeof pairing | number;
    if type(uPairing) == "table" then local k3: table = uPairing; local e3: number = uPairing.n; end
    declare uBranded: (string & { tag: number }) | number;
    if type(uBranded) == "table" then local d4: never = uBranded; end
    declare uThread: thread | number;
    if type(uThread) == "table" then local d5: never = uThread; end
    declare uLookalike: { __luaThreadBrand: number } | number;
    if type(uLookalike) == "table" then local k6: table = uLookalike; end
    declare uCallableMix: ({ a: number } & (() => void)) | number;
    if type(uCallableMix) == "table" then local d7: never = uCallableMix; end
    declare uThreadMix: (thread & { a: number }) | number;
    if type(uThreadMix) == "table" then local d8: never = uThreadMix; end
    
    // Column 4: `type(x) == "function"` narrowing. A callable pairing is dead here
    // (its runtime tag is "table"); a callable intersection is kept.
    if type(uPlain) == "function" then local g1: never = uPlain; end
    if type(uFn) == "function" then uFn(); end
    if type(uPairing) == "function" then local g3: never = uPairing; end
    if type(uBranded) == "function" then local g4: never = uBranded; end
    if type(uThread) == "function" then local g5: never = uThread; end
    if type(uLookalike) == "function" then local g6: never = uLookalike; end
    if type(uCallableMix) == "function" then uCallableMix(); end
    if type(uThreadMix) == "function" then local g8: never = uThreadMix; end
